channel.title: Comparison on Remote Web Admin | Managed OpenClaw AI Assistant Service
channel.description: Recent content in Comparison on Remote Web Admin | Managed OpenClaw AI Assistant Service

item.title: OpenClaw vs ChatGPT: Which Personal AI Assistant Is Right for You?
item.description:
OpenClaw vs ChatGPT: Which Personal AI Assistant Is Right for You?

The personal AI assistant market has two broad categories: hosted platforms you sign up for, and self-hosted open-source gateways you control. ChatGPT is the most recognisable name in the first category. OpenClaw is rapidly becoming the leading option in the second. This comparison breaks down the key differences to help you decide which is right for your situation.

Head-to-Head Comparison

Factor OpenClaw ChatGPT
Privacy Data stays on your server Conversations may train OpenAI models
Monthly cost ~$6–11/mo (VPS + API) $20/mo (Plus) or $200/mo (Pro)
Customisation Full control - system prompts, plugins, personas Limited (custom instructions only)
Messaging channels WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage Web browser + iOS/Android app only
AI model choice OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or local Ollama GPT-4o, o1, o3 (OpenAI only)
Setup time 30–60 minutes (or handled by RemoteWebAdmin) Instant (sign up and go)
Always-on availability Requires a running VPS or Mac Always available via OpenAI infrastructure

Privacy: Where OpenClaw Has a Clear Advantage

When you use ChatGPT, your conversations are processed on OpenAI’s servers. OpenAI’s data usage policy allows them to use your conversations to improve their models (unless you opt out via account settings, which many users never find or do). Even with opt-out, your data still transits OpenAI’s infrastructure.
